sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, input String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is a column-oriented database management system for online analytical processing of queries.');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (2, 'clickhouse supports multi-dimensional data analysis.');
SELECT wordShingleMinHashCaseInsensitiveUTF8(input, 3, 6) AS hash_values FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_strings SET input = 'ClickHouse is highly performant for analytical workloads.' WHERE id = 2;
